qa_pair.question: Using the ITSI schema tools, what is the REST endpoint path for the kpi_base_search object type?
The correlation_search object is not on the ITOA interface. According to its schema, what is its full REST endpoint path?
A service object contains a nested array under its kpis field. What is the object-type slug of the subordinate structure used for each item in that array?
Inside a Service KPI, the entity_thresholds field references which subordinate schema slug?
How many ITSI object types (top-level REST object types, not subordinate structures) have a documented schema in the bundled 4.21 corpus?
For a service, which single field does the schema mark as required?
According to the Service KPI schema, what are the three possible values of the alert_on field?
If you validate the service payload {"titel": "Web"} with itsi_validate_object_payload, which existing field name does the tool suggest you meant instead of "titel"?
When you validate a service payload that sets the read-only field object_type, does itsi_validate_object_payload report ok=true with a warning, or ok=false? Answer with just the value of ok.
In an entity_rules rule item, the field_type attribute takes which two values according to the schema description?
